  Sign-up to IOI Account to claim the community unlocks. More wishlists unlocks collective rewards each time you reach a new tier.
 
 
  About the Game  Follow James Bond as a young, resourceful and sometimes reckless recruit in MI6's training program, and discover an origin story of the world’s most famous spy.
  
  After a heroic act, young Naval air crewman James Bond is offered to join the newly revived Double 0 program. But when a mission to stop a rogue agent ends in tragedy, he must join forces with his reluctant mentor Greenway to expose a deep conspiracy and stop a looming coup at the heart of the State.
  
   BECOME 007  
  Discover a new standalone, re-imagined James Bond origin story, and the events that lead an audacious young hero to become the best MI6 agent.
        
  
   A THRILLING ESPIONAGE ADVENTURE 
  Embark on missions in breathtaking locations, drive iconic vehicles, and dive into a cinematic adventure in pursuit of a rogue agent who’s always one step ahead.
        
  
   SPYING, YOUR WAY 
  Go silent or go loud. Whether fighting with fists or firepower, using gadgets to infiltrate, or bluffing your way past guards, the approach is entirely up to you.
  
        
  
   WELCOME TO MI6 
  Test your skills and replay your favorite missions with additional modifiers, for endless espionage fun!

Oferta de precompra   
     
  ¡Reserva 007 First Light y mejora tu aventura de espionaje con una actualización gratuita a la Edición Deluxe! Gánate tu número con atuendos inspirados en objetos memorables de 007, brilla con todo tu esplendor con el pack Resplandeciente, que incluye cuatro aspectos de dispositivos, y desbloquea un nuevo aspecto de arma: Marca del Agente.
  
  Reserva 007 First Light y recibe la mejora a la Edición Deluxe y acceso anticipado de 24 horas gratis:
  
   Cuatro atuendos: 
    Día de los Muertos
    Explorador del desierto
      Ancla silenciosa
      Agente y caballero
    
   Aspecto de arma: 
    Marca del Agente
    
   Pack Resplandeciente, que incluye cuatro aspectos de dispositivos: 
    Encendedor resplandeciente
    Auriculares resplandecientes
    Pistola de dardos resplandeciente
    Bolígrafo resplandeciente
    
 
 
  ¡Hitos y recompensas de la lista de deseos!    CONSIGUE RECOMPENSAS POR CADA HITO DE LA LISTA DE DESEOS 
     
  La misión es sencilla: únete para desbloquear los hitos de la lista de deseos de 007 First Light. Con cada hito conseguido, se desbloquean nuevas recompensas del juego y la comunidad que te darán estilo, sofisticación y una recompensa secreta.
  Regístrate en la cuenta de IOI para reclamar los elementos desbloqueados de la comunidad. Cuantas más listas de deseos haya, más recompensas colectivas se desbloquearán cada vez que alcances un nuevo nivel.
 
 
  Acerca del juego  Tras una heroica hazaña, a James Bond, un joven piloto naval, se le ofrece la oportunidad de unirse al recién reactivado programa 00. Sin embargo, durante una misión en la que debía neutralizar a un agente rebelde, sucede una tragedia que lo obliga a unir fuerzas con Greenway, su reticente mentor, para así sacar a la luz el gran complot que amenaza al país. 
  
   CONVIÉRTETE EN 007   
  Descubre una nueva historia independiente y reinventada sobre los orígenes de James Bond y cómo un joven y audaz héroe llega a convertirse en el mejor agente del MI6.
        
  
   UNA TREPIDANTE AVENTURA DE ESPÍAS  
  Emprende misiones en ubicaciones imponentes, ponte al volante de vehículos emblemáticos y embárcate en una aventura cinemática mientras persigues a un agente rebelde que siempre va un paso por delante.
        
  
   ESPÍA... A TU MANERA 
  ¿Sigilo o fuerza bruta? Lucha a puñetazos o con armas de fuego, usa artilugios para infiltrarte o márcate un farol con los guardias: la estrategia la decides tú.
        
  
   TE DAMOS LA BIENVENIDA AL MI6  
  ¡Pon a prueba tus habilidades y repite tus misiones favoritas con modificadores adicionales para disfrutar espiando sin límites!

Offre de précommande      
  Précommandez 007 First Light et bonifiez votre aventure d’espionnage avec une mise à niveau gratuite vers l’Édition Deluxe! Endossez votre numéro avec des tenues inspirées des souvenirs de 007, couvrez-vous d’or avec le pack étincelant comprenant 4 apparences de gadgets, et débloquez une nouvelle apparence d’arme : la marque de l’agent.
  
  Précommandez 007 First Light et recevez la mise à niveau Édition Deluxe ainsi qu’un accès anticipé de 24 heures gratuitement :
   4 tenues : 
    Jour des Morts
    Explorateur du désert
    Ancre silencieuse
    Agent élégant
    
   Skin d'arme : 
    Marque de l'agent
    
   Pack Resplendissant, comprenant 4 skins de gadgets : 
    Briquet resplendissant
    Oreillettes resplendissantes
    Pistolet à fléchettes resplendissant
    Stylo resplendissant
   
 
  Paliers et récompenses !    RECEVEZ DES RÉCOMPENSES À CHAQUE PALIER 
     
  La mission est simple : rassemblez-vous et débloquez les paliers de 007 First Light. À chaque palier atteint, de nouvelles récompenses dans le jeu et de la communauté sont débloquées. Style, sophistication et une récompense secrète seront au rendez-vous.
  Connectez-vous à votre compte IOI pour obtenir les récompenses de la communauté. Des récompenses collectives sont débloquées au fur et à mesure que de nouvelles personnes ajoutent le jeu à leur liste de souhaits et que celui-ci atteint de nouveaux paliers.
 
 
  À propos du jeu  Suite à un acte de bravoure, James Bond, jeune membre de la Navy, est enrôlé dans le programme Double 0. Mais quand une mission visant à neutraliser un espion séditieux s’achève en tragédie, il doit s’allier à son mentor Greenway pour dévoiler une conspiration menaçant le cœur même du pouvoir. 
  
   DEVENEZ 007   
  Découvrez l’histoire inédite et revisitée des origines de James Bond, et suivez le parcours tumultueux d’un jeune héros devenu le meilleur agent du MI6.
    
   
   UNE AVENTURE D’ESPIONNAGE PALPITANTE   
  Embarquez pour des missions exotiques, pilotez des véhicules iconiques et plongez dans une aventure digne d’un film, à la poursuite d’un agent séditieux ayant toujours une longueur d’avance.
        
  
   L’ESPION, C’EST VOUS 
  Optez pour la discrétion ou la bagarre. Combat à mains nues ou armes à feu, gadgets ou infiltration, bluff sous le nez de l’ennemi, le choix vous appartient.
        
  
   BIENVENUE AU MI6   
  Testez vos aptitudes d’espion et rejouez vos missions préférées avec des modificateurs additionnels, pour encore plus de plaisir !

Vorbestellungsangebot      
  Bestelle 007 First Light vor und mach dein Spionageabenteuer mit einem kostenlosen Upgrade auf die Deluxe Edition noch besser! Verdiene dir deine Agentennummer mit von 007-Erinnerungsstücken inspirierten Outfits, blende mit den 4 Gadget-Skins des Glänzenden Pakets deine Gegner mit Goldschimmer und schalte einen neue Waffen-Skin frei: Zeichen des Agenten.
  
  Bestelle 007 First Light vor und erhalte das Deluxe Edition-Upgrade sowie 24 Stunden Vorabzugang kostenlos:
  
   4 Outfits: 
    Tag der Toten
    Wüstenforscher
    Stummer Anker
    Gentleman-Agent
    
   Waffen-Skin: 
    Zeichen des Agenten
    Glänzendes Paket, einschließlich 4 Gadget-Skins:
    Glänzendes Feuerzeug
    Glänzende Kopfhörer
    Glänzende Pfeilpistole
    Glänzender Stift
    
 
 
  Wunschliste-Meilensteine & Belohnungen!    ERHALTE BELOHNUNGEN FÜR JEDEN WUNSCHLISTEN-MEILENSTEIN 
     
  Die Mission ist einfach: Schließt euch zusammen und schaltet die Meilensteine der Wunschliste für  007 First Light  frei. Mit jedem erreichten Meilenstein werden neue Belohnungen im Spiel und für die Community freigeschaltet – mit Stil, Raffinesse und einer geheimen Überraschung.
  Melde dich mit einem IOI-Konto an, um die Community-Belohnungen zu erhalten. Mehr Einträge auf der Wunschliste schalten bei jeder neuen Stufe kollektive Belohnungen frei.
 
 
  Infos zum Spiel  Nach einer Heldentat erhält der junge Marineluftwaffensoldat James Bond das Angebot zur Aufnahme in das wiederbelebte Doppelnull-Programm.
  Doch als ein abtrünniger Agent aufgehalten werden soll und die Mission auf tragische Weise scheitert, bleibt ihm nichts anderes übrig, als gemeinsam mit seinem widerwilligen Mentor Greenway eine Verschwörung aufzudecken und einen drohenden Putsch im Herzen der Nation zu verhindern.
  
   WERDE ZU 007   
  Erlebe eine neu erdachte Hintergrundgeschichte aus dem James-Bond-Universum und die Ereignisse, die einen kühnen jungen Helden zum besten MI6-Agenten aller Zeiten werden ließen.
        
  
   EIN SPANNENDES SPIONAGEABENTEUER  
  Begib dich auf Missionen an atemberaubenden Schauplätzen, fahre Fahrzeuge mit Kultstatus und erlebe ein filmreifes Abenteuer auf der Jagd nach einem abtrünnigen Agenten, der stets einen Schritt voraus ist.
        
  
   SPIONIERE AUF DEINE ART  
  Laut oder leise? Kämpfe mit Fäusten oder Patronen, nutze Gadgets, um in feindliches Territorium einzudringen, oder führe die Wachen hinters Licht – die Herangehensweise bestimmst allein du.
        
  
   WILLKOMMEN BEIM MI6  
  Stell deine Fähigkeiten auf die Probe und spiele deine Lieblingsmissionen mehrmals mit zusätzlichen Modifikatoren – für grenzenloses Spionagevergnügen!

Oferta de pré-reserva      
  Pré-encomenda o 007 First Light e vive aventuras de espionagem ultraemocionantes com uma atualização gratuita para a Edição Deluxe! Torna-te um agente 00 com visuais inspirados em memorabilia do 007, abusa do dourado com o Pacote Cintilante que inclui 4 skins para gadgets e desbloqueia uma nova skin de arma, a Marca do Agente.
  Pré-encomenda o 007 First Light e recebe o upgrade para a Edição Deluxe e acesso antecipado de 24 horas gratuitamente:
   4 visuais: 
    Día de Los Muertos
    Explorador do Deserto
    Âncora Silenciosa
    Agente Cavalheiro
     Skin para arma: 
    Marca do Agente
     Pacote Cintilante, incluindo 4 skins para gadgets: 
    Isqueiro Cintilante
    Auriculares Cintilantes
    Pistola de Dardos Cintilante
    Caneta Cintilante
    
  
 
 
  Etapas da lista de desejos e prémios!    RECEBE PRÉMIOS EM CADA ETAPA DA LISTA DE DESEJOS 
     
  A missão é simples: cria uma equipa e vence as etapas da lista de desejos de 007 First Light. Cada etapa superada desbloqueia novos prémios no jogo e na comunidade, adicionando estilo, sofisticação e uma recompensa secreta.
  Inscreve-te na IOI Account para resgatares os desbloqueios da comunidade. Mais listas de desejos desbloqueiam prémios coletivos sempre que subires de nível.
 
 
  Acerca do jogo  Após um ato heroico, o jovem tripulante da aviação naval, James Bond, é convidado a juntar-se ao renovado programa 00. Porém, quando uma missão para deter um agente corrupto termina em tragédia, ele é obrigado a unir forças com o seu relutante mentor, Greenway, para expor uma teia de conspirações e impedir um golpe iminente no coração do Estado.
  TORNA-TE NO 007  
  Explora a nova, independente e reinventada história sobre a origem de James Bond e os acontecimentos que levaram um audaz e heroico jovem a tornar-se no melhor agente do MI6.
        
  UMA AVENTURA DE ESPIONAGEM EMOCIONANTE  
  Embarca em missões por locais deslumbrantes, conduz veículos icónicos e mergulha numa aventura cinematográfica em busca de um agente corrupto que está sempre um passo à frente.
        
  ESPIONAGEM À TUA MANEIRA 
  Esconde-te nas sombras ou dá um autêntico espetáculo. Podes escolher entre lutar com os teus próprios punhos ou com artilharia pesada e utilizar dispositivos para te infiltrares ou fazer o teu melhor bluff para passares pelos seguranças - és tu quem dita as regras. 
        
  DAMOS-TE AS BOAS-VINDAS AO MI6 
  Põe as tuas capacidades à prova e repete as tuas missões favoritas com modificadores adicionais que elevam a emoção da espionagem a outro nível!

Forudkøbstilbud      
  Forudbestil 007 First Light, og tag dit spionageeventyr til næste niveau med en gratis opgradering til Deluxe-udgaven! Gør dig fortjent til dit kodenavn med outfits, der er inspireret af 007, gå den gyldne vej med 4 gadget-skins fra Den funklende pakke, og lås op for et nyt våbenskin – Agentens mærke.
  
  Forudbestil 007 First Light og modtag Deluxe Edition-opgraderingen samt 24 timers tidlig adgang gratis:
  
   4 outfits: 
    De dødes dag
    Ørkenjæger
    Lydløst anker
    Gentleman
    
   Våbenskin: 
    Agentens mærke
    
   Den funklende pakke, indeholder 4 gadget-skins: 
    Funklende lighter
    Funklende øretelefoner
      Funklende bedøvelsespistol
    Funklende pen
    
 
 
  Milepæle og belønninger i ønskelisten    FÅ BELØNNINGER FOR HVER MILEPÆL I ØNSKELISTEN 
     
  Missionen er enkel: saml jer, og få adgang til milepælene i ønskelisten for 007 First Light. For hver milepæl, der nås, låses der op for nye belønninger i spillet og i fællesskabet, som giver dig stil, raffinement og en hemmelig belønning.
  Tilmeld dig en IOI-konto for at få fællesskabsbelønningerne. Flere ønskelister låser op for flere fælles belønninger, hver gang du når et nyt niveau.
 
 
  Om spillet  Følg James Bond som ung, snarrådig og til tider dumdristig rekrut under uddannelse hos MI6, og oplev en fortælling om, hvordan verdens mest berømte spion blev til det, han er i dag.
   
  Efter en heltemodig indsats bliver det unge medlem af flådens flybesætning James Bond tilbudt en plads på den nyligt genåbnede 00-uddannelse. Men da en mission for at stoppe en egenrådig agent ender i en tragedie, må Bond sammen med sin modvillige mentor, Greenway, kaste sig ud i kampen om at afsløre et komplet og standse et kupforsøg i rigets hjerte.
  
   BLIV TIL 007 
  Oplev en ny fritstående og nyfortolket fortælling om James Bonds oprindelse og de begivenheder, der går forud for, at en dristig, ung helt ender som den bedste agent i MI6.
        
  
   ET NERVEPIRRENDE SPIONEVENTYR   
  Drag på mission til steder, der tager pusten fra dig, kør i ikoniske biler, og dyk ned i et filmisk eventyr i din jagt på en egenrådig agent, som altid er et skridt foran.
        
   
   VÆR DEN SPION, DU HAR LYST TIL  
  Gå lydløst frem, eller lad alle høre dig komme. Du vælger selv, hvordan du vil være som spion, og om du vil kæmpe med næver eller pistoler, infiltrere fjendens område med hjælp fra dine gadgets eller snyde vagterne for at komme forbi.
        
  
   VELKOMMEN TIL MI6   
  Sæt dine evner på prøve, og kast dig ud i endeløse spioneventyr, når du spiller dine yndlingsmissioner igen og igen med ekstra modifikationer!

Offerta per il preacquisto   
     
  Prenota 007 First Light e arricchisci la tua avventura di spionaggio passando gratuitamente alla Deluxe Edition! Guadagna il tuo nome in codice con dei look ispirati ai gadget di 007, sfoggiando tutto l'oro con il Pacchetto Splendente che include 4 skin per gadget e sblocca una nuova skin arma: Firma dell'agente.
  
  Pre-ordina 007 First Light e ricevi l’aggiornamento alla Deluxe Edition e l’accesso anticipato di 24 ore gratuitamente:
   4 look: 
    Giorno dei Morti
    Esploratore del deserto
    Ancora silenziosa
    Operatore gentiluomo
    
   Skin dell'arma: 
    Firma dell'agente
    
   Pacchetto Splendente che include 4 skin per gadget: 
    Accendino splendente
    Auricolari splendenti
    Pistola a dardi splendente
    Penna splendente
    
 
 
  Traguardi della lista dei desideri e ricompense!    OTTIENI RICOMPENSE PER OGNI TRAGUARDO DELLA LISTA DEI DESIDERI 
     
  La missione è semplice: unire le forze e sbloccare i traguardi della lista dei desideri per 007 First Light. Ogni traguardo raggiunto sbloccherà nuove ricompense nel gioco e nella community, aggiungendo stile, raffinatezza e un premio segreto.
  Registra un account IOI per richiedere gli sblocchi della community. Più liste dei desideri sbloccano ricompense collettive ogni volta che raggiungi un nuovo livello.
  
 
 
  Informazioni sul gioco  Dopo un gesto eroico, un giovane James Bond, membro dell'aviazione della marina, riceve l'offerta di unirsi al riformato Programma Doppio Zero. Ma quando la missione di arresto di un agente ribelle termina in tragedia, dovrà unire le forze con il suo riluttante mentore Greenway per portare a galla una grossa cospirazione e sventare un imminente colpo di stato. 
  
   DIVENTA 007   
  Scopri una nuova storia indipendente e reinventata sulle origini di James Bond e sugli eventi che hanno trasformato un audace giovane eroe nel miglior agente dell'MI6.  
        
  
   UN'ADRENALINICA AVVENTURA DI SPIONAGGIO  
  Cimentati in missioni in località mozzafiato, mettiti alla guida di veicoli iconici e lasciati travolgere da un'avventura cinematografica a caccia di un agente ribelle che è sempre un passo avanti.
        
   
   SII LA SPIA CHE HAI SEMPRE SOGNATO  
  Muoviti di soppiatto o alla luce del sole. Che tu preferisca i pugni o le armi da fuoco, i dispositivi per infiltrarti o camuffarti per sfuggire alle guardie, sta a te scegliere l'approccio migliore.
        
  
   TI DIAMO IL BENVENUTO ALL'MI6   
  Metti alla prova le tue abilità e ritenta le tue missioni preferite con modificatori aggiuntivi per vivere appieno l'esperienza dello spionaggio!

brief:
Pre-Purchase Offer      
  Pre-order 007 First Light and elevate your espionage adventure with a free Deluxe Edition upgrade! Earn your number with outfits inspired by 007 memorabilia, go all gold blazing with the Gleaming Pack including 4 gadget skins, and unlock a new weapon skin, Agent’s Mark.
  
  Pre-Order 007 First Light and receive the Deluxe Edition Upgrade and 24 hour early access for free:
   4 outfits: 
    Day of the Dead
    Desert Explorer
    Silent Anchor
    Gentleman Operator
  
     Weapon skin: 
    Agent’s Mark
    
   Gleaming Pack, including 4 gadget skins: 
    Gleaming Lighter
    Gleaming Earphones
    Gleaming Dart Gun
    Gleaming Pen
    
 
 
  Wishlist Milestones & Rewards!    GET REWARDS FOR EACH WISHLIST MILESTONE 
     
  The mission is simple: rally together and unlock the wishlist milestones for 007 First Light. With every milestone reached, new in-game and community rewards are unlocked, adding style, sophistication, and a secret reward.
  Sign-up to IOI Account to claim the community unlocks. More wishlists unlocks collective rewards each time you reach a new tier.
 
 
  About the Game  Follow James Bond as a young, resourceful and sometimes reckless recruit in MI6's training program, and discover an origin story of the world’s most famous spy.
  
  After a heroic act, young Naval air crewman James Bond is offered to join the newly revived Double 0 program. But when a mission to stop a rogue agent ends in tragedy, he must join forces with his reluctant mentor Greenway to expose a deep conspiracy and stop a looming coup at the heart of the State.
  
   BECOME 007  
  Discover a new standalone, re-imagined James Bond origin story, and the events that lead an audacious young hero to become the best MI6 agent.
        
  
   A THRILLING ESPIONAGE ADVENTURE 
  Embark on missions in breathtaking locations, drive iconic vehicles, and dive into a cinematic adventure in pursuit of a rogue agent who’s always one step ahead.
        
  
   SPYING, YOUR WAY 
  Go silent or go loud. Whether fighting with fists or firepower, using gadgets to infiltrate, or bluffing your way past guards, the approach is entirely up to you.
  
        
  
   WELCOME TO MI6 
  Test your skills and replay your favorite missions with additional modifiers, for endless espionage fun!

title: YAKOH SHINOBI OPS
description:
Infiltrate, deceive, survive.
 Your group of four Shinobi will need to work together to escape near-certain death in this hardcore stealth action game.
   [What is YAKOH SHINOBI OPS?]   Four Shinobi lurk in the darkness.
 They silently dash across the land like shadows in the night.
  What awaits your team of Shinobi at the end of their operation?
 Is it paradise? Or almost certain death?
 True Shinobi do not need to kill their opponents.
 Use your skills to conceal yourselves and deceive your enemies.
 
 The undying Pursuers are hot on your trail. The only way to survive is to avoid them at all costs.
 For only when a Shinobi has returned alive is their operation truly complete.
 
 ACQUIRE Corp., the pioneer of the stealth action genre, has teamed up with SHUEISHA GAMES to bring you a four-player ninja game unlike anything you've ever experienced.
 Welcome to the new generation of Shinobi stealth action.
   [Blend into the night and infiltrate enemy territory.]         Your operation will take you behind enemy lines where the watchful eyes of their sentries and countless traps await you and your team.
 Reaching your destination will take careful teamwork, and require each Shinobi to call on the skills they've mastered.
 Move as the shadows.
 Synchronize with your fellow Shinobi and fade into the darkness to avoid detection.
  A split-second misstep can cost Shinobi their lives.
 Search for clues and make your way deep into the enemy's stronghold.
   [Use unique Ninjutsu to overcome the impossible.]         Each Shinobi has access to their own unique Ninjutsu.
 "Grappling hooks to reach high places." 
 "Smash through walls to open up new paths." 
 "Smokescreens to support allies." 
 "Flash grenades to distract foes."
 Each Shinobi must understand their role and act in perfect sync.
 What one cannot achieve alone, four can accomplish together. So press on!
   [Avoid the specter of death to return alive.]         Merely completing the operation isn't enough. Shinobi must return alive to truly fulfill their duty.
 Avoid the specter of death and make a desperate escape.
 Work together with your team and use every method at your disposal to escape—to survive.
 Overcoming such trials is the way of the Shinobi.
   [Escape the keen gaze of the undying "Hunters".]         Fighting the "Hunters" head-on would spell certain demise for your Shinobi.
 Avoid this deathly specter to achieve your noble mission.
 This white-knuckle pursuit delivers a stealth experience unlike anything you've faced.
   About ACQUIRE Corp.   ACQUIRE Corp. was founded in 1994 and quickly established a unique development style by creating comical, character-rich games such as AKIBA’S TRIP. 
 The company’s representative works of “wa” (Japanese-style) adventure-games including Tenchu and Way of Samurai have won ACQUIRE critical acclaim. In recent years, he has been responsible for the overall development of SQUARE ENIX's titles OCTOPATH TRAVELER I and II series, as well as Nintendo's title Mario & Luigi RPG: Brotherhood!, establishing his track record in RPG development.

   [Use unique Ninjutsu to overcome the impossible.]         Each Shinobi has access to their own unique Ninjutsu.
 "Grappling hooks to reach high places." 
 "Smash through walls to open up new paths." 
 "Smokescreens to support allies." 
 "Flash grenades to distract foes."
 Each Shinobi must understand their role and act in perfect sync.
 What one cannot achieve alone, four can accomplish together. So press on!
   [Avoid the specter of death to return alive.]         Merely completing the operation isn't enough. Shinobi must return alive to truly fulfill their duty.
 Avoid the specter of death and make a desperate escape.
 Work together with your team and use every method at your disposal to escape—to survive.
 Overcoming such trials is the way of the Shinobi.
   [Escape the keen gaze of the undying "Hunters".]         Fighting the "Hunters" head-on would spell certain demise for your Shinobi.
 Avoid this deathly specter to achieve your noble mission.
 This white-knuckle pursuit delivers a stealth experience unlike anything you've faced.
   About ACQUIRE Corp.   ACQUIRE Corp. was founded in 1994 and quickly established a unique development style by creating comical, character-rich games such as AKIBA’S TRIP. 
 The company’s representative works of “wa” (Japanese-style) adventure-games including Tenchu and Way of Samurai have won ACQUIRE critical acclaim. In recent years, he has been responsible for the overall development of SQUARE ENIX's titles OCTOPATH TRAVELER I and II series, as well as Nintendo's title Mario & Luigi RPG: Brotherhood!, establishing his track record in RPG development.

 Your group of four Shinobi will need to work together to escape near-certain death in this hardcore stealth action game.
   [What is YAKOH SHINOBI OPS?]   Four Shinobi lurk in the darkness.
 They silently dash across the land like shadows in the night.
  What awaits your team of Shinobi at the end of their operation?
 Is it paradise? Or almost certain death?
 True Shinobi do not need to kill their opponents.
 Use your skills to conceal yourselves and deceive your enemies.
 
 The undying Pursuers are hot on your trail. The only way to survive is to avoid them at all costs.
 For only when a Shinobi has returned alive is their operation truly complete.
 
 ACQUIRE Corp., the pioneer of the stealth action genre, has teamed up with SHUEISHA GAMES to bring you a four-player ninja game unlike anything you've ever experienced.

title: Gimmick! 2
description:
A Classic Challenge Modernized In  Gimmick! 2 , you once again meet the green little yokai Yumetaro. Decades after his first adventure he now sets out on a new quest in a world packed with interesting challenges, dangerous enemies, and hidden treasures. The game can be played in either a friendlier assisted mode, or if you’re up for a challenge play in the true-to-the-original “Gimmick!” mode! 
 
        Star physics As a yokai, Yumetaro has the ability to summon and throw a powerful star that not only bounces, but also keeps the momentum of his movement. The Star can be used to activate switches, defend against enemies and even be ridden to get to those hard-to-reach places while exploring the secrets of the world. You can discover treasure, find shortcuts or set speed records by mastering the star's bouncing physics. Experiment with it to unlock its full potential. This is a game with true star power!
 
        A Legendary Soundtrack The composer David Wise hardly needs any introduction. In his work on the  Gimmick! 2  soundtrack, he has both written completely new melodies and remade old classics. The soundtrack was creatively directed by Pelle Cahndlerby and recorded live in Sweden together with Joel Bille.
 
        Blast from the past The original Gimmick! game was released for the Famicom™ in 1992. It was localized and released in the West - but only in Scandinavia. This, combined with the fact that the game's physics and gameplay mechanics were far ahead of its time, made the game both fabled and beloved. With  Gimmick! 2 , however, there is no longer any doubt: this is a game that the whole world should have the chance to experience.

        Blast from the past The original Gimmick! game was released for the Famicom™ in 1992. It was localized and released in the West - but only in Scandinavia. This, combined with the fact that the game's physics and gameplay mechanics were far ahead of its time, made the game both fabled and beloved. With  Gimmick! 2 , however, there is no longer any doubt: this is a game that the whole world should have the chance to experience.

Un desafío clásico modernizado En  Gimmick! 2 , volverás a encontrarte con el pequeño yokai verde Yumetaro. Décadas después de su primera aventura, ahora se embarca en una nueva aventura por un mundo repleto de desafíos interesantes, enemigos peligrosos y tesoros ocultos. El juego presenta un sencillo modo asistido y el modo "Gimmick!" para quienes deseen afrontar un desafío fiel al original.
 
        Física estelar Como yokai, Yumetaro posee la capacidad de invocar y lanzar una potente estrella que bota y conserva el impulso de su movimiento. Podrás usarla para activar interruptores, defenderte de los enemigos e incluso como montura para llegar a lugares de difícil acceso mientras exploras los secretos del mundo. Si logras dominar la física rebotadora de la estrella, podrás descubrir tesoros, encontrar atajos o conseguir récords de velocidad. Experimenta con ella para desbloquear todo su potencial. Este juego sí que tiene poder estelar!

Un défi classique modernisé Dans  Gimmick! 2 , vous retrouverez Yumetaro, le petit yokai vert. Plusieurs décennies après sa première aventure, le voilà lancé dans une nouvelle quête à travers un monde débordant de défis, d'ennemis redoutables et de trésors dissimulés. Vous pouvez choisir de jouer en mode avec assistance pour une expérience plus confortable, ou en mode fidèle aux sensations du « Gimmick! » original si vous recherchez un défi ! 
 
        Physique stellaire Yumetaro est un yokai qui a le pouvoir d'invoquer et lancer une puissante étoile qui rebondit et conserve l'élan de ses déplacements. L'étoile peut lui servir à activer des interrupteurs et à se défendre contre des ennemis, et elle peut même être chevauchée pour accéder aux endroits les plus difficiles à atteindre au cours de son exploration des secrets du monde. Maîtriser la physique qui régit les rebonds de l'étoile vous permettra de découvrir des trésors, de trouver des raccourcis et de battre des records de vitesse. N'hésitez pas à faire des expériences pour déverrouiller son plein potentiel. Voilà un jeu infusé de la puissance des étoiles !

Eine klassische Herausforderung modernisiert In  Gimmick! 2  triffst du den kleinen grünen Yokai Yumetaro wieder! Jahrzehnte nach seinem ersten Abenteuer bricht er nun auf eine neue Quest in eine Welt voller interessanter Herausforderungen, gefährlicher Gegner und verborgener Schätze auf. Das Spiel kann entweder im freundlicheren Unterstützungsmodus gespielt werden oder, wenn du der Herausforderung gewachsen bist, im originalgetreuen „Gimmick!“-Modus! 
 
        Sternenphysik Als Yokai kann Yumetaro einen mächtigen Stern beschwören und werfen, der nicht nur hüpft, sondern auch den Schwung seiner Bewegung beibehält.
 Mit dem Stern kannst du Schalter aktivieren, dich gegen Feinde verteidigen oder ihn sogar nutzen, um an jene schwer zu erreichenden Orte zu gelangen, während du die Geheimnisse der Welt erkundest. Du kannst Schätze entdecken, Abkürzungen finden oder einen Geschwindigkeitsrekord aufstellen, indem du die Hüpf-Physik des Sterns meisterst. Experimentiere damit, um das volle Potenzial freizuschalten. Dies ist ein Spiel mit echter Sternkraft!

Um desafio clássico modernizado Em  Gimmick! 2 , encontras de novo Yumetaro, o pequeno yokai verde. Décadas depois da sua primeira aventura, ele lança-se agora numa nova expedição num mundo repleto de desafios interessantes, inimigos perigosos e tesouros escondidos. O jogo pode ser jogado num modo assistido, mais amigável, ou, se estiveres pronto para um desafio, no modo “Gimmick!” fiel ao original! 
 
        Física da estrelas Enquanto yokai, o Yumetaro tem a habilidade de invocar e lançar uma estrela poderosa que não apenas salta, mas também mantém o impulso do movimento dele. A Estrela pode ser usada para ativar interruptores, defender-te contra inimigos e até mesmo ser montada para chegares a lugares de difícil acesso enquanto exploras os segredos do mundo. Podes descobrir tesouros, encontrar atalhos ou estabelecer recordes de velocidade dominando a física de salto da estrela. Experimenta-a para desbloqueares todo o seu potencial. Este é um jogo com verdadeiro poder de estrela!

En klassisk udfordring, der er blevet moderniseret I  Gimmick! 2  møder vi endnu en gang den lille, grønne yokai Yumetaro. Flere årtier efter sit første eventyr drager han nu ud på en ny opgave i en verden fyldt med spændende udfordringer, frygtelige fjender og skjulte skatte. Spillet kan både spilles i en mere imødekommende tilstand med mulighed for hjælp, eller du kan udfordre dig selv ved at spille i den originale "Gimmick!"-tilstand. 
 
        Stjernefysik Som yokai har Yumetaro også evnen til at hidkalde og slå smut med en kraftfuld stjerne, mens den bevarer sit momentum i bevægelsesretningen. Stjernen kan bruges til at aktivere kontakter, som forsvar mod fjender og som et transportmiddel for at komme frem til svært tilgængelige steder, mens du udforsker verdens hemmeligheder. Du kan finde skatte og genveje eller sætte hastighedsrekorder ved at beherske stjernens bevægelsesfysik. Eksperimenter med den for at frigøre dens fulde potentiale. Dette er et spil med ægte stjernekraft!

Una classifica sfida modernizzata In  Gimmick! 2  rincontrerai Yumetaro, il piccolo yokai verde. Decenni dopo la sua prima avventura, ha ora deciso di intraprendere una nuova impresa, ricca di sfide, nemici pericolosi e tesori nascosti. Puoi giocare in una modalità assistita più amichevole oppure, se preferisci una sfida più ardua, puoi provare la modalità "Gimmick!", fedele al titolo originale! 
 
        Fisica della stella In quanto yokai, Yumetaro è in grado di evocare e lanciare una potente stella che non solo rimbalza, ma mantiene anche il suo slancio. La stella può essere usata per attivare interruttori, difendersi dai nemici e arrivare in luoghi difficili da raggiungere mentre esplori i segreti di questo mondo. Puoi scoprire tesori, trovare scorciatoie e stabilire record di velocità padroneggiando le proprietà di rimbalzo della stella. Prova a usarla in vari modi per sbloccare il suo pieno potenziale. Questo è proprio un gioco stellare!

title: Gimmick! Special Edition
description:
An old-school challenge enhanced for the modern player 
 SUNSOFT's NES™ classic Gimmick! returns in this long-wished-for Special Edition from City Connection. Experience a stunning physics-based platformer with updated features like online leaderboards, achievements, a time attack mode, save and quick load, a rewind function, a gorgeous gallery (with cartridges, art, and scanned manuals), and more. Stellar platform physics with a bouncing star 
 Explore a physics-based playground that was way ahead of its time. As the cute youkai Yumetaro, use your star-summoning powers to tackle complex challenges with creativity and finesse. Your wonderful star will help you reach hidden spots, traverse cliffs, and pull off trick shots that outwit even the toughest baddies! Discover a hidden NES™ treasure 
 Gimmick! was exclusively released on Famicom™/NES™ in Japan and Scandinavia in the early ‘90s. It pushed the console to its limits and the Japanese cartridge featured SunSoft 5B, a custom sound chip that let Masashi Kageyama compose a star-studded soundtrack. Gimmick! remains one of the most valuable (and rarest) NES™ cartridges ever made. The Scandinavian version was called “Mr. Gimmick”. Uncover secrets in a race against time!       
 Gimmick! Special Edition features a time attack mode for speedrunners, and completionists can hunt for secrets all throughout the game. Unlock a wonderful surprise by finding everything. For a hard-core challenge, disable all quality-of-life features in "Serious Mode" to crank up the excitement!
        Modern enhancements:   Achievements
   Time Attack Mode
   Online Leaderboards
   Save and Quick Load
   Rewind Function
   Gallery mode
   Sound test

¡Un desafío de la vieja escuela mejorado para el jugador de hoy en día! El clásico Gimmick! de NES™ de SUNSOFT regresa con la ansiada Special Edition de City Connection. Disfruta de un impresionante juego de plataformas basado en la física con funciones actualizadas como clasificaciones en línea, logros, un modo contrarreloj, guardado y carga rápida, una función para rebobinar, una magnífica galería (con cartuchos, arte y dibujos manuales escaneados) y mucho más. Juego basado en la física de plataformas estelar con una estrella saltarina Explora un patio de recreo basado en la física que se adelantó, y mucho, a su época. Como Yumetaro, un youkai muy mono, usa tus poderes para invocar a las estrellas y superar complejos desafíos con creatividad y sutileza. ¡Tu maravillosa estrella te ayudará a llegar a recovecos ocultos, atravesar acantilados y realizar tiros que tienen truco para burlar incluso a los malos más duros! Descubre un tesoro NES™ escondido Gimmick! se lanzó exclusivamente en Famicom™/NES™ en Japón y Escandinavia a principios de los 90. Fue más allá de los límites de la consola, y el cartucho japonés venía con SunSoft 5B, un chip de sonido personalizado que le permitió a Masashi Kageyama componer una banda sonora estelar. Gimmick! sigue siendo uno de los cartuchos de NES™ más valiosos (y excepcionales). La versión escandinava se llamaba «Mr. Gimmick». ¡Descubre secretos en una carrera a contrarreloj! Gimmick! Special Edition incluye un modo contrarreloj para los velocistas, y a quienes les guste completarlo todo pueden buscar secretos ocultos por todo el juego. Desbloquea una sorpresa increíble al encontrarlo todo. ¡Para un desafío aún mayor, deshabilita todas las funciones que te permiten tener calidad de vida en «Serious Mode» para que el juego se vuelva aún más emocionante! Mejoras actuales:   Logros
   Modo contrarreloj
   Clasificaciones en línea
   Guardado y carga rápida
   Función para rebobinar
   Modo galería
   Prueba de sonido

Un défi d’hier amélioré pour les joueurs d’aujourd’hui  
 Gimmick!, le classique de SUNSOFT sur NES™, revient dans une édition spéciale très attendue développée par City Connection. Vivez l’expérience d’un jeu de plateforme basé sur la physique qui inclut des fonctionnalités modernisées telles que les classements en ligne, les succès, le mode Contre-la-montre, la sauvegarde et le chargement rapides, une fonction retour en arrière, une superbe galerie (avec des cartouches, des illustrations et des manuels numérisés) et bien plus encore. Une physique de jeu de plateforme extraordinaire grâce à une étoile rebondissante  
 Explorez un terrain de jeu basé sur la physique qui était prodigieusement en avance sur son temps. Dans ce jeu, vous êtes un adorable youkai prénommé Yumetaro capable d'invoquer une étoile qui vous aidera à relever des défis ardus avec créativité et habileté. Utilisez-la pour atteindre des endroits cachés, traverser des falaises et réaliser des mouvements de génie qui vous donneront l’avantage même face aux ennemis les plus coriaces ! Découvrez un trésor caché NES™ !  
 Gimmick! est sorti exclusivement sur la Famicom™/NES™ au Japon et en Scandinavie au début des années 90. Le jeu a repoussé les limites de la console : les cartouches japonaises intégraient une puce audio SunSoft 5B élaborée tout spécialement, ce qui a permis à Masashi Kageyama de composer une bande-son stellaire pour le jeu. Gimmick! reste l’une des cartouches les plus précieuses (et rares) jamais produites pour la NES™. La version scandinave du jeu s’appelait « Mr. Gimmick ». Révélez des secrets dans une course contre le temps !       
 Gimmick! Special Edition propose un mode Contre-la-montre pour les speedrunners et ceux qui aiment finir les jeux à fond pourront partir à la chasse aux secrets à travers tout le jeu. Une extraordinaire surprise vous attend lorsque vous les aurez tous trouvés. Pour un défi encore plus exaltant, désactivez toutes les fonctionnalités de qualité de vie dans le « Serious Mode » et augmentez la tension d’un cran !
        Améliorations modernes :   Succès
   Mode Contre-la-montre
   Classements en ligne
   Sauvegarde et chargement rapides
   Fonction retour en arrière
   Mode galerie
   Test sonore

Eine Herausforderung der alten Schule, aufpoliert für den modernen Spieler SUNSOFTs NES™-Klassiker Gimmick! kehrt zurück in dieser langersehnten Special Edition von City Connection. Erlebe einen atemberaubenden, physikbasierten Plattformer mit verbesserten Funktionen wie Online-Ranglisten, Errungenschaften, einem Zeitangriffsmodus, Schnellspeichern und -laden, einer Wiederholungsfunktion, einer fantastischen Galerie (mit Spielmodulen, Illustrationen und eingescannten Handbüchern) und vielem mehr. Stellare Plattformphysik mit einem hüpfenden Stern Erkunde einen physikbasierten Spielplatz, der schon damals seiner Zeit weit voraus war. Nutze als der niedliche Youkai Yumetaro deine Sternenbeschwörungskräfte, um komplexe Herausforderungen mit Kreativität und Finesse zu meistern. Dein fantastischer Stern hilft dir, versteckte Orte zu erreichen, Klippen zu überwinden und Tricks auszuführen, mit denen du selbst die größten Schurken überlisten kannst! Entdecke einen verborgenen NES™-Schatz Gimmick! wurde Anfang der 90er Jahre exklusiv in Japan und Skandinavien für das Famicom™/NES™ veröffentlicht. Es brachte die Konsole an ihre Grenzen, und das japanische Spielmodul beinhaltete SunSoft 5B, einen besonderen Soundchip, mit dem Masashi Kageyama einen erstklassigen Soundtrack komponierte. Gimmick! ist nach wie vor eine der wertvollsten (und seltensten) NES™-Spielmodule, die je hergestellt wurden. Die skandinavische Version trug den Namen „Mr. Gimmick“. Decke in einem Wettlauf gegen die Zeit Geheimnisse auf!       
 Die Gimmick! Special Edition bietet einen Zeitangriffsmodus für Speedrunner, und Komplettisten können überall im Spiel nach versteckten Geheimnissen suchen. Schalte eine tolle Überraschung frei, indem du alles findest. Für eine besondere Herausforderung kannst du im „Serious Mode“ alle Komfortfunktionen deaktivieren und so die Spannung steigern!
        Moderne Neuerungen:   Errungenschaften
   Zeitangriffsmodus
   Online-Ranglisten
   Schnellspeichern und -laden
   Wiederholungsfunktion
   Galeriemodus
   Soundtest

Um desafio retrô aprimorado para jogadores modernos O Gimmick! clássico do NES™ da SUNSOFT volta para a tão aguardada Special Edition da City Connection. Experimente um extraordinário jogo de plataforma baseado em física com recursos atualizados como placares online, conquistas, modo contra o relógio, atalhos para salvar e carregar, função de rebobinar, uma bela galeria (com cartuchos, arte e manuais escaneados) e muito mais. A física da plataforma estelar com uma estrela saltitante Explore um universo baseado em física, que estava muito à frente de seu tempo. Assuma o papel do youkai Yumetaro, use seus poderes estelares para enfrentar desafios complexos com criatividade e elegância. Sua estrela maravilhosa ajudará você a alcançar pontos escondidos, atravessar penhascos e fazer truques que desafiam até os mais corajosos! Descubra um tesouro escondido do NES™ Gimmick! foi lançado exclusivamente no Famicom™/NES™ no Japão e na Escandinávia, no início dos anos 90. Ele testou os limites do console e o cartucho japonês possuía o SunSoft 5B, um chip de som personalizado que permitiu que Masashi Kageyama compusesse uma trilha sonora sublime. Gimmick!, cuja versão escandinava se chamava "Mr. Gimmick", continua sendo um dos mais valiosos (raros) cartuchos NES™ já feitos. Descubra segredos em uma corrida contra o tempo!       
 Gimmick! Special Edition contém um modo contra o relógio para quem gosta de velocidade e está repleto de segredos para quem não gosta de perder nada. Desbloqueie uma surpresa maravilhosa ao encontrar todos eles. Para um desafio ainda maior, desative os recursos de qualidade de vida no "Serious Mode" e aumente a emoção!

Experience a stunning physics-based platformer with updated features like online leaderboards, achievements, a time attack mode, save and quick load, a rewind function, a gorgeous gallery (with cartridges, art, and scanned manuals), and more. Stellar platform physics with a bouncing star 
 Explore a physics-based playground that was way ahead of its time. As the cute youkai Yumetaro, use your star-summoning powers to tackle complex challenges with creativity and finesse. Your wonderful star will help you reach hidden spots, traverse cliffs, and pull off trick shots that outwit even the toughest baddies! Discover a hidden NES™ treasure 
 Gimmick! was exclusively released on Famicom™/NES™ in Japan and Scandinavia in the early ‘90s. It pushed the console to its limits and the Japanese cartridge featured SunSoft 5B, a custom sound chip that let Masashi Kageyama compose a star-studded soundtrack. Gimmick! remains one of the most valuable (and rarest) NES™ cartridges ever made. The Scandinavian version was called “Mr. Gimmick”. Uncover secrets in a race against time!       
 Gimmick! Special Edition features a time attack mode for speedrunners, and completionists can hunt for secrets all throughout the game. Unlock a wonderful surprise by finding everything. For a hard-core challenge, disable all quality-of-life features in "Serious Mode" to crank up the excitement!
        Modern enhancements:   Achievements
   Time Attack Mode
   Online Leaderboards
   Save and Quick Load
   Rewind Function
   Gallery mode
   Sound test

Una sfida alla vecchia maniera migliorata per il giocatore moderno Un classico del NES™, Gimmick! di SUNSOFT torna in questa tanto desiderata Special Edition sviluppata da City Connection. Cimentati in un sensazionale platform basato sulla fisica con funzioni aggiornate, come classifiche online, obiettivi da completare, una modalità time attack, salvataggi e caricamenti rapidi, una funzione rewind, una magnifica galleria (che comprende cartucce, disegni e manuali scansionati) e molto altro. Platform, fisica e una stella rimbalzante Esplora un ambiente di gioco basato sulla fisica che ha precorso i tempi. Nei panni dell'adorabile youkai Yumetaro, usa i tuoi poteri stellari per risolvere sfide complesse con creatività e agilità. La stella che puoi evocare ti aiuterà a raggiungere punti nascosti, attraversare precipizi e sbaragliare con colpi magistrali anche i nemici più tosti! Scopri una gemma nascosta del NES™ Gimmick! fu rilasciato esclusivamente su Famicom™/NES™ in Giappone e Scandinavia nei primi anni '90 e spingeva la console ai suoi limiti. Inoltre, la cartuccia giapponese disponeva del SunSoft 5B, un chip sonoro personalizzato che consentì a Masashi Kageyama di comporre una colonna sonora stellare. Gimmick! è tutt'oggi una delle cartucce del NES™ più preziose (e rare) mai create. La versione scandinava era intitolata "Mr. Gimmick". Tanti segreti da svelare in una corsa contro il tempo! Gimmick! Special Edition comprende una modalità time attack per chi ama le speedrun e tanti segreti sparsi per i livelli di gioco per i completisti. Chi troverà tutto riceverà una fantastica sorpresa. E per chi cerca una vera sfida, la "Serious Mode" disabilita tutte le funzioni che semplificano l'esperienza! Una ventata di modernità:   Obiettivi
   Modalità time attack
   Classifiche online
   Salvataggi e caricamenti rapidi
   Funzione rewind
   Modalità galleria
   Test del sonoro

title: Brigandine The Legend of Runersia
description:
The continent of Runersia is home to six major powers with more than 40 bases, 100 knights, and 50 types of monsters. Select a ruler, organize knights and monsters into troops, and conquer enemy bases! How you wish to do battle is entire up to you, so devise the best strategies and lead your nation toward continental conquest! How will your legend unfold?
   
    
 Time passes on Runersia in seasons. Each season consists of an Organization Phase and Attack Phase. During the Organization Phase, knights and monsters of various classes and skills are organized into troops in preparation for upcoming battles. During the Attack Phase, turn-based troop battles take place on a map made up of hexagonal spaces. Make use of unit skills, elements, enclosure effects, terrain advantages, and other battle tactics to lead your side to victory! All nations, knights, and monsters in the game will continue to battle and grow as you do. The game is also packed with other ways to grow your armies such as classes, equipment, and various items.
       
   
    
 Runersia - a continent blessed with mana showers from times of old. Five Mana Stones discovered long ago have been embedded into special armor called Brigandines, each one representing the ideology of the nation possessing it. These have come to be known as the Brigandine of Justice, Sanctity, Freedom, Glory, and Ego. The time now is Runersia 781, and a war looms on the horizon for five nations and a small tribe with incompatible ideologies. Six rulers and their rune knights will throw themselves into the conflict, each with their own hopes and expectations. Once the land has been unified under a single banner, memories from The Legend of Runersia will be reclaimed and the truth of what happened here on Runersia shall be revealed.
    
   
    
 Enemy nations aim to conquer the continent as well and will attack your bases to do so. The battle for the continent will differ with each playthrough.Accumulate stories and events from the six nations in the Records. After clearing the main mode, The Legend of Runersia, the Alternate Chapter challenge mode will be unlocked, allowing for even more replayability.
    Main Mode Choose one of the six powers and reclaim the pages of "The Legend of Runersia" as you aim to unify the land.
    Challenge Mode Choose ten epic heroes, one ruler and nine knights, and charge headfirst into chaos. Aim for total conquest.
    Creative Mode Assemble an army of knights and monsters that have accompanied you on past campaigns. Plan and execute creative strategies for epic battles.
    New Features   Addition of Creative Mode
   Items to be Carried Over
   Customize Graphics Performance
   Optimized for Keyboard & Mouse
   Battle Map HP Display

localized_title.text: ブリガンダイン ルーナジア戦記

localized_description.text:
本作是以迎接乱世的幻想世界「卢纳基亚大陆」做为舞台的回合制战棋游戏。游戏中共有六大阵营供玩家选择，玩家可以调度100名以上的骑士以及招唤魔物编成部队，纵横沙场操控部队作战，以制霸大陆为目标，不断获得胜利！
   
    
 露纳希亚大陆在“编成阶段”和“攻击阶段”过后，时间流逝，计为1节时间。在“编成阶段”，为即将到来的战斗做准备，并用拥有多种职阶和技能的骑士和怪物组成部队。在“攻击阶段”，在以回合制前进的六边形格子组成的战斗地图中展开部队战斗。通过单位的技能和属性、包围效果和地形效果、部队战术来获得胜利吧。游戏中登场的所有国家、骑士、怪物会不断展开战斗、不断成长。“转职”和“装备品・物品收集”等培养要素也很丰富。
       
   
    
 自古以来，被玛纳倾注的大陆露纳希亚。很久以前在这片大陆上发现的五颗玛纳宝石，被制成了特殊的铠甲“圣铠”，成为了国家、人类等各种思想的象征。它们分别被称为“正义”、“高洁”、“自由”、“荣耀”与“自我”圣铠。时值露纳希亚历781年。五个国家与一个小民族因彼此互不相容的思想、信仰和历史而迎来了新的战乱时代。六位君主以及符文骑士们，怀抱着各自的信念，投身于战火之中。当你最终实现大陆统一的时候，史书《露纳希亚战记》的记忆会复苏，你就会明白。露纳希亚发生过的一切，以及所有的故事。
    
   
    
 敌国也以称霸大陆为目标，采取各种战略和战术进攻。每次玩的时候，大陆的战斗历史的展开都不尽相同。收集6个势力各自不同的故事和事件的“史书的回忆”。除了故事模式“露纳希亚战记”，还有在通关故事模式后开放的挑战模式“异说之章”等，互动要素非常丰富。
    故事模式 选择6大势力之一，追溯史书《露纳希亚战记》的记忆，以统一露纳希亚为目标的模式。
    挑战模式 自主挑选1名君主与9名骑士，与这10名英雄豪杰一起投身混沌的乱世，剑指称霸大陆与真正的巅峰的模式。
    自由模式 在这个模式里，你能自由组合曾经与你一同经历战乱的骑士和怪物，一边仔细推敲自己的战略，一边随心所欲地战斗。

盧納基亞大陸上有6大勢力、超過40處據點、100名以上的騎士及超過50種的怪物。要成為哪方勢力的君主，以哪些騎士與怪物編列部隊，又要往哪個據點進軍呢？戰鬥方法極度自由，端看玩家如何運籌帷幄。請以自己的戰略與戰術引導自己的國家制霸大陸吧！
   
    
 盧納基亞大陸的時光，會隨著由「編列階段」及「攻擊階段」構成的「節」經過而流逝。在「編列階段」時必須以擁有多采多姿的兵種及技能的騎士與怪物來建立部隊，為即將到來的戰爭做好準備。而在「攻擊階段」時，部隊戰則會以回合制之形式，在由六角形網格構成的戰鬥地圖上展開。請利用單位的技能與屬性、包圍效果、地形效果、部隊戰術來奪取勝利吧。在遊戲中登場的所有國家、騎士、怪物都能藉由不斷戰鬥來持續成長。「轉職」及「收集裝備、道具」等培育元素亦相當豐富。
       
   
    
 盧納基亞大陸自古以來便是瑪那降注之地。而遠古時期在這片大陸上發現的五個瑪那石，則已成為特別的「鑲甲」，化身為象徵人類與國家的思想的存在。其後，這五件鑲甲被人們分別稱為「正義」、「高潔」、「自由」、「榮耀」、「自我」。時值盧納基亞年曆781年。五國一族因各自互不相容的思想、信仰、歷史，而使這片大陸迎來了全新戰亂時代。六位君主和眾多盧恩騎士則胸懷各志，投身於戰火之中。然而，當統一大陸之業完成之時，史書『盧納基亞戰記』的記憶將會甦醒，你也將會得知一切。得知在這片盧納基亞大陸曾發生過的一切、所有的故事。
    
   
    
 遊戲中的敵國也會以稱霸大陸為目標，憑著各種戰略與戰術發動侵略。每次遊戲，都會讓這片大陸上的戰爭歷史產生不同的發展。「史書追憶」中收集了六個勢力各有千秋的多種故事及事件。除了主要模式「盧納基亞戰記」外，更有在主要模式通關後開放的挑戰模式「異說之章」等豐富的深度遊戲元素。
    主要模式 選擇六個勢力中的其中一個，依循史書『盧納基亞戰記』的記憶，以統一盧納基亞大陸為目標的模式。
    挑戰模式 選擇1位君主和9位騎士，與這10位英雄豪傑一同投身於混沌的亂世，以稱霸大陸為目標，邁向真正的巔峰的模式。
    自由模式 可自由搭配過去曾與你一同挺過多次戰亂的騎士與怪物，在盡情戰鬥的同時仔細鑽研專屬於你自己的戰略的模式。

ルーナジア大陸には６つの勢力、４０以上の拠点、１００人以上の騎士と５０種以上のモンスターが存在します。どの君主となり、どの騎士とモンスターで部隊を編成し、どの拠点へ進軍するか？その戦い方はプレイヤーの自由です。自分の戦略と戦術で自国を大陸制覇に導きましょう。
   
    
 ルーナジア大陸は「編成フェイズ」と「攻撃フェイズ」を経て節が経過し、時を刻みます。「編成フェイズ」では来るべき戦いに備え、多種多様なクラスやスキルを持つ騎士とモンスターで部隊を構成します。「攻撃フェイズ」では、ターン制で進むヘクス（六角形）で構成されたバトルマップでの部隊戦が繰り広げられます。ユニットのスキルや属性、包囲効果や地形効果、部隊戦術で勝利をつかみましょう。登場する全ての国、騎士、モンスター達は絶えず戦いを繰り広げ、成長していきます。「クラスチェンジ」や「装備品・アイテム収集」などの育成要素も豊富です。
       
   
    
 古よりマナが降り注ぐ大陸ルーナジア。この大陸ではるか昔に発見された五つのマナ・ストーンは、特別の鎧 “ブリガンダイン”となり人間や国家の思想を象徴する存在となっていた。そして、それぞれが「正義」「高潔」「自由」「誇り」「自我」のブリガンダイン、と呼ばれるようになったのである。時はルーナジア暦７８１年。五つの国と小さな一族は互いに相容れない思想、信仰、歴史により新たな戦乱の時代を迎えようとしていた。六人の君主とルーンの騎士たちは、それぞれの想いを胸に戦火へと身を投じていく。しかるに大陸統一を果たしたとき史書「ルーナジア戦記」の記憶は蘇り、そなたは知るであろう。このルーナジアで起きた、すべての、そしてあらゆる物語を。
    
   
    
 敵国も大陸制覇を目指し様々な戦略と戦術で侵攻してきます。大陸の戦いの歴史はプレイする度に異なる展開を見せます。６勢力でそれぞれ異なる様々なストーリーやイベントを収集する「史書の追憶」。メインモード「ルーナジア戦記」に加え、メインモードクリア後に開放するチャレンジモード「異説の章」などやりこみ要素も豊富です。
    メインモード ６つの勢力のいずれかを選び、史書『ルーナジア戦記』の記憶を辿りながら、ルーナジア大陸の統一を目指すモードです。
    チャレンジモード 1人の君主と9人の騎士、自らが選んだ10人の英俊豪傑と共に混沌たる乱世に身を投じ、真の大陸制覇と頂を目指すモードです。
    フリーモード かつてあなたと共に戦乱を生き抜いた騎士やモンスターたちを自由に組み合わせ、あなただけの戦略をじっくりと練りながら、好きなだけ戦うことが出来るモードです。
    STEAM版の追加・調整点   フリーモードの追加
   消費アイテムの引き継ぎ
   グラフィックレベルの選択オプション追加
   キーボード＆マウス操作を最適化
   戦闘マップ時のHP表示

The continent of Runersia is home to six major powers with more than 40 bases, 100 knights, and 50 types of monsters. Select a ruler, organize knights and monsters into troops, and conquer enemy bases! How you wish to do battle is entire up to you, so devise the best strategies and lead your nation toward continental conquest! How will your legend unfold?
   
    
 Time passes on Runersia in seasons. Each season consists of an Organization Phase and Attack Phase. During the Organization Phase, knights and monsters of various classes and skills are organized into troops in preparation for upcoming battles. During the Attack Phase, turn-based troop battles take place on a map made up of hexagonal spaces. Make use of unit skills, elements, enclosure effects, terrain advantages, and other battle tactics to lead your side to victory! All nations, knights, and monsters in the game will continue to battle and grow as you do. The game is also packed with other ways to grow your armies such as classes, equipment, and various items.
       
   
    
 Runersia - a continent blessed with mana showers from times of old. Five Mana Stones discovered long ago have been embedded into special armor called Brigandines, each one representing the ideology of the nation possessing it. These have come to be known as the Brigandine of Justice, Sanctity, Freedom, Glory, and Ego. The time now is Runersia 781, and a war looms on the horizon for five nations and a small tribe with incompatible ideologies. Six rulers and their rune knights will throw themselves into the conflict, each with their own hopes and expectations. Once the land has been unified under a single banner, memories from The Legend of Runersia will be reclaimed and the truth of what happened here on Runersia shall be revealed.
    
   
    
 Enemy nations aim to conquer the continent as well and will attack your bases to do so. The battle for the continent will differ with each playthrough.Accumulate stories and events from the six nations in the Records. After clearing the main mode, The Legend of Runersia, the Alternate Chapter challenge mode will be unlocked, allowing for even more replayability.
    Main Mode Choose one of the six powers and reclaim the pages of "The Legend of Runersia" as you aim to unify the land.
    Challenge Mode Choose ten epic heroes, one ruler and nine knights, and charge headfirst into chaos. Aim for total conquest.
    Creative Mode Assemble an army of knights and monsters that have accompanied you on past campaigns. Plan and execute creative strategies for epic battles.
    New Features   Addition of Creative Mode
   Items to be Carried Over
   Customize Graphics Performance
   Optimized for Keyboard & Mouse
   Battle Map HP Display

title: PRAGMATA
description:
PRAGMATA Sketchbook  The gameplay demo, Sketchbook, lets you try out this combat system that engages both sides of your brain, while you also get to experience what it's like to traverse the lunar research station.
 
 *This demo supports English and Japanese voice.
 *Some in-game features may differ from the full game.
    
 
  Pre-Purchase Offer  Pre-order Contents:
 ・Hugh Outfit - Neo Bushido
 ・Diana Outfit - Neo Kunoichi
 
 Play as Hugh and Diana in samurai and ninja inspired costumes from the Sengoku Period.
 
 The above content may also become available at a later date.
    
 
  PRAGMATA Deluxe Edition  *The licenses for the items in this set can be purchased individually. Please be careful of duplicate purchases.
 
 The Deluxe Edition is a bundle that includes the main game and the Shelter Variety Pack.
 
 Shelter Variety Pack Contents:
 ・Hugh Outfit - Heavy Lifter
 ・Hugh Outfit - Lunar Cat
 ・Diana Outfit - Mecha Builder
 ・Diana Outfit - Fluffy
 ・Weapon Skin - Grip Gun DS
 ・Shelter BGM - Memories Are You (Lo-fi Ver.)
 ・Shelter BGM - Dawn (EDM Ver.)
 ・Shelter BGM - Shelter (Jazz Ver.)
 ・Diana Gesture - Drowsy
 ・Diana Gesture - Pumped Up
 ・Diana Gesture - Stepping
 ・Data Library - Artwork
 
    
 
  About the Game Capcom’s newest IP—PRAGMATA. An all-new Science Fiction action adventure with its own unique hacking twist! 
 It is the near future, and protagonists Hugh and his android companion Diana, must work together as they make their way through the cold lunar research station.

localized_description.text:
PRAGMATA Sketchbook  The gameplay demo, Sketchbook, lets you try out this combat system that engages both sides of your brain, while you also get to experience what it's like to traverse the lunar research station.
 
 *This demo supports English and Japanese voice.
 *Some in-game features may differ from the full game.
    
 
  Pre-Purchase Offer  Pre-order Contents:
 ・Hugh Outfit - Neo Bushido
 ・Diana Outfit - Neo Kunoichi
 
 Play as Hugh and Diana in samurai and ninja inspired costumes from the Sengoku Period.
 
 The above content may also become available at a later date.
    
 
  PRAGMATA Deluxe Edition  *The licenses for the items in this set can be purchased individually. Please be careful of duplicate purchases.
 
 The Deluxe Edition is a bundle that includes the main game and the Shelter Variety Pack.
 
 Shelter Variety Pack Contents:
 ・Hugh Outfit - Heavy Lifter
 ・Hugh Outfit - Lunar Cat
 ・Diana Outfit - Mecha Builder
 ・Diana Outfit - Fluffy
 ・Weapon Skin - Grip Gun DS
 ・Shelter BGM - Memories Are You (Lo-fi Ver.)
 ・Shelter BGM - Dawn (EDM Ver.)
 ・Shelter BGM - Shelter (Jazz Ver.)
 ・Diana Gesture - Drowsy
 ・Diana Gesture - Pumped Up
 ・Diana Gesture - Stepping
 ・Data Library - Artwork
 
    
 
  About the Game Capcom’s newest IP—PRAGMATA. An all-new Science Fiction action adventure with its own unique hacking twist! 
 It is the near future, and protagonists Hugh and his android companion Diana, must work together as they make their way through the cold lunar research station.

PRAGMATA Sketchbook  En Sketchbook, la demo del juego, podrás probar este sistema de combate que activa ambos hemisferios del cerebro mientras sorteas obstáculos para atravesar una estación de investigación lunar.
 
 *Esta demo está doblada al inglés y al japonés.
 *Algunos aspectos del juego podrían ser diferentes de los del juego final.
    
 
  Oferta de precompra  Contenidos por reserva:
 ・Atuendo de Hugh: Neo Bushido
 ・Atuendo de Diana: Neo Kunoichi
 
 Juega como Hugh y Diana con trajes inspirados en samuráis y ninjas del periodo Sengoku.
 
 El contenido anterior también podría estar disponible en el futuro.
    
 
  PRAGMATA Deluxe Edition  *Estos artículos también pueden comprarse individualmente. Ten cuidado para evitar hacer compras duplicadas.
 
 La Deluxe Edition es un lote que incluye el juego principal y el pack variado Refugio.
 
 Contenidos del pack variado Refugio:
 ・Atuendo de Hugh: Gravitador
 ・Atuendo de Hugh: Gato lunar
 ・Atuendo de Diana: Robomecánica
 ・Atuendo de Diana: Gatito
 ・Diseño de arma: Pistola cinética DS
 ・Música del Refugio: Memories Are You (ver. Lo-fi)
 ・Música del Refugio: Dawn (ver. EDM)
 ・Música del Refugio: Shelter (ver. Jazz)
 ・Gesto de Diana: Con sueño
 ・Gesto de Diana: Entusiasmada
 ・Gesto de Diana: Paso a paso
 ・Biblioteca de datos: Ilustraciones
    
 
 
  Acerca del juego PRAGMATA, la nueva IP de Capcom. ¡Una nueva aventura de acción y ciencia ficción con un giro único de hackeo!
 En un futuro próximo, Hugh y su inseparable compañera androide, Diana, deberán unir fuerzas para sobrevivir en una gélida estación lunar de investigación.

PRAGMATA Sketchbook  La démo de gameplay, Sketchbook, vous invite à tester le système de combat qui nécessite d'activer les deux hémisphères de votre cerveau, tout en vous donnant un avant-goût de l'exploration du centre de recherche lunaire.
 
 * Cette démo propose des doublages en anglais et en japonais.
 * Certaines des fonctionnalités présentées peuvent différer de celles du jeu complet.
    
 
  Offre de précommande  Contenus de précommande :
 ・Tenue pour Hugh - Neo Bushido
 ・Tenue pour Diana - Neo Kunoichi
 
 Jouez en offrant à Hugh et Diana des tenues de samouraï et de ninja de l'époque Sengoku.
 
 Le contenu ci-dessus pourrait aussi devenir disponible à une date ultérieure.
    
 
  PRAGMATA Deluxe Edition  * Les articles de ce pack peuvent être achetés séparément. Assurez-vous de ne pas faire d'achats en double.
 
 La Deluxe Edition inclut le jeu principal et le Pack varié - Refuge.
 
 Contenus du Pack varié - Refuge :
 ・Tenue pour Hugh - Opérateur
 ・Tenue pour Hugh - Chat lunaire
 ・Tenue pour Diana - Mécano
 ・Tenue pour Diana - Doudoune
 ・Skin d'arme - Grip Gun DS
 ・Musique du Refuge - Memories Are You (Lo-fi Ver.)
 ・Musique du Refuge - Dawn (ver. EDM)
 ・Musique du Refuge - Shelter (ver. jazz)
 ・Émote de Diana - Fatiguée
 ・Émote de Diana - Motivée
 ・Émote de Diana - Pas
 ・Banque de données - Artwork
    
 
 
  À propos du jeu La toute nouvelle franchise de Capcom : Pragmata. Une aventure d'action sur fond de science-fiction, avec une touche unique de hacking !
 Nous sommes dans un futur proche. Hugh est accompagné de l'androïde Diana, et nos deux protagonistes doivent coopérer au mieux pour se frayer un chemin dans le dédale d'une froide station lunaire de recherche.

PRAGMATA Sketchbook  Die Gameplay-Demo namens Sketchbook lässt dich das Kampfsystem testen, das beide Seiten deines Gehirns fordert. Zusätzlich erlebst du, wie es sich auf einer Mondforschungsstation anfühlt.
 
 *Diese Demo unterstützt die englische und japanische Sprachausgabe.
 *Einige Funktionen im Spiel können sich von der Vollversion unterscheiden.
    
 
  Vorbestellungsangebot  Inhalte für Vorbesteller:
 ・Outfit für Hugh: Neo Bushido
 ・Outfit für Diana: Neo Kunoichi
 
 Spiele als Hugh und Diana in von Ninjas aus der Sengoku-Zeit inspirierten Outfits.
 
 Der oben angezeigte Inhalt kann auch zu einem späteren Zeitpunkt zur Verfügung stehen.
    
 
  PRAGMATA Deluxe Edition  *Diese Produkte sind auch als Teil eines Sets erhältlich. Achte darauf, doppelte Käufe zu vermeiden.
 
 Die Deluxe Edition ist ein Paket bestehend aus dem Hauptspiel und dem Variety Pack: Schutzraum.
 
 Inhalte des Variety Packs: Schutzraum:
 ・Outfit für Hugh: Heavy Lifter
 ・Outfit für Hugh: Mondkater
 ・Outfit für Diana: Mech-Konstrukteurin
 ・Outfit für Diana: Mondkätzchen
 ・Waffenoptik: Grip Gun DS
 ・Schutzraum HGM: Memories Are You (Lo-fi Ver.)
 ・Schutzraum HGM: Dawn (EDM Ver.)
 ・Schutzraum HGM: Shelter (Jazz Ver.)
 ・Geste für Diana: Schläfrig
 ・Geste für Diana: Aufgekratzt
 ・Geste für Diana: Tänzchen
 ・Datenbibliothek: Illustrationen
 
    
 
  Infos zum Spiel Capcoms neueste IP: PRAGMATA. Ein brandneues Science-Fiction-Action-Abenteuer mit einem einzigartigen Hacking-Twist! 
 Es ist die nahe Zukunft, und die Protagonisten Hugh und seine androide Begleiterin Diana müssen zusammenarbeiten, während sie sich ihren Weg durch eine kalte Mondforschungsstation bahnen.

PRAGMATA Sketchbook  A demo de jogabilidade, Sketchbook, permite-te explorar este sistema de combate que envolve ambos os lados do teu cérebro, enquanto te dá também a oportunidade de atravessar a estação de investigação lunar.
 
 *Esta demo inclui dobragem em inglês e japonês.
 *Algumas funcionalidades no jogo podem diferir da versão completa.
    
 
  Oferta de pré-reserva  Conteúdos da reserva:
 ・Visual de Hugh - Neo Bushido
 ・Visual de Diana - Neo Kunoichi
 
 Entra na pele de Hugh e Diana com roupas inspiradas em samurais e ninjas do período Sengoku.
 
 O conteúdo acima poderá ser disponibilizado no futuro.
    
 
  PRAGMATA Deluxe Edition  *Os itens deste conjunto também podem ser adquiridos individualmente. Evita comprar o mesmo item mais do que uma vez.
 
 A Deluxe Edition inclui o jogo principal e o Shelter Variety Pack.
 
 Conteúdo do Shelter Variety Pack:
 ・Visual de Hugh - Heavy Lifter
 ・Visual de Hugh - Lunar Cat
 ・Visual de Diana - Mecha Builder
 ・Visual de Diana - Fluffy
 ・Visual de Arma - Grip Gun DS
 ・Música do Shelter - Memories Are You (Lo-fi Ver.)
 ・Música do Shelter - Dawn (EDM Ver.)
 ・Música do Shelter - Shelter (Jazz Ver.)
 ・Gesto de Diana - Drowsy
 ・Gesto de Diana - Pumped Up
 ・Gesto de Diana - Stepping
 ・Arte - Biblioteca de Dados
 
    
 
  Acerca do jogo PRAGMATA é o novo título da Capcom. Num futuro próximo, os protagonistas Hugh e Diana, a sua companheira androide, unem esforços para abrir caminho pela estação de investigação lunar gélida.

PRAGMATA Sketchbook  I spildemoen Sketchbook kan du prøve et kampsystem, der aktiverer begge sider af hjernen, mens du bevæger dig gennem en måneforskningsbase.
 
 *Denne demo understøtter engelske og japanske stemmer.
 *Visse spilelementer kan være anderledes end i det komplette spil.
    
 
  Forudkøbstilbud  Forudbestillingsindhold:
 ・Hugh Outfit – Neo Bushido
 ・Diana Outfit – Neo Kunoichi
 
 Spil som Hugh og Diana i samurai- og ninjakostumer, der er inspireret af Sengoku-perioden.
 
 Ovennævnte indhold kan blive tilgængeligt på et senere tidspunkt.
    
 
  PRAGMATA Deluxe Edition  *Genstandene i dette sæt kan købes individuelt. Pas på, at du ikke kommer til at købe den samme genstand to gange.
 
 Deluxe Edition er en pakke, der indeholder grundspillet og Shelter Variety Pack.
 
 Shelter Variety Pack-indhold:
 ・Hugh Outfit – Heavy Lifter
 ・Hugh Outfit – Lunar Cat
 ・Diana Outfit – Mecha Builder
 ・Diana Outfit – Fluffy
 ・Våben-skin – Grip Gun DS
 ・Shelter BGM – Memories Are You (Lo-fi Ver.)
 ・Shelter BGM – Dawn (EDM Ver.)
 ・Shelter BGM – Shelter (Jazz Ver.)
 ・Diana Gesture – Drowsy
 ・Diana Gesture – Pumped Up
 ・Diana Gesture – Stepping
 ・Databibliotek – illustrationer
    
 
 
  Om spillet Capcoms nyeste titel – PRAGMATA. Vi befinder os i en nær fremtid, hvor vores protagonist og hans ledsagende androide skal samarbejde, mens de forsøger at finde vej igennem en kold forskningsstation på månen.

PRAGMATA Sketchbook  La demo di gioco, Sketchbook, ti permette di sperimentare un sistema di combattimento che coinvolge entrambi gli emisferi del cervello e provare l'ebbrezza di attraversare la stazione di ricerca lunare.
 
 *Questa demo supporta il doppiaggio in inglese e in giapponese.
 *Alcune funzionalità di gioco potrebbero differire dalla versione completa.
    
 
  Offerta per il preacquisto  Contenuti del pre-ordine:
 ・Costume di Hugh - Neo Bushido
 ・Costume di Diana - Neo Kunoichi
 
 Gioca nei panni di Hugh e Diana con costumi ispirati a samurai e ninja del Periodo Sengoku.
 
 I contenuti di cui sopra potrebbero anche essere resi disponibili più avanti.
    
 
  PRAGMATA Deluxe Edition  *Gli oggetti in questo set possono essere acquistati singolarmente. Fai attenzione a non acquistare due volte lo stesso oggetto.
 
 La Deluxe Edition è un pacchetto che include il gioco principale e lo Shelter Variety Pack.
 
 Contenuti dello Shelter Variety Pack:
 ・Costume Hugh - Operaio corazzato
 ・Costume Hugh - Gatto lunare
 ・Costume Diana - Costruttrice di robot
 ・Costume Diana - Soffice
 ・Skin arma - Pistola cinetica DS
 ・BGM rifugio - Memories Are You (Lo-fi Ver.)
 ・BGM rifugio - Dawn (EDM Ver.)
 ・BGM rifugio - Shelter (Jazz Ver.)
 ・Gesto Diana - Sonnolenta
 ・Gesto Diana - Energetica
 ・Gesto Diana - Passo
 ・Biblioteca dati - Opere d'arte
 
    
 
  Informazioni sul gioco Una nuova avventura d'azione fantascientifica con un tocco di hacking unico!
 Arriva la nuova IP di Capcom: Pragmata. In un futuro non troppo lontano, Hugh e l'androide Diana devono collaborare per farsi strada attraverso una gelida stazione di ricerca lunare.

brief:
PRAGMATA Sketchbook  The gameplay demo, Sketchbook, lets you try out this combat system that engages both sides of your brain, while you also get to experience what it's like to traverse the lunar research station.
 
 *This demo supports English and Japanese voice.
 *Some in-game features may differ from the full game.
    
 
  Pre-Purchase Offer  Pre-order Contents:
 ・Hugh Outfit - Neo Bushido
 ・Diana Outfit - Neo Kunoichi
 
 Play as Hugh and Diana in samurai and ninja inspired costumes from the Sengoku Period.
 
 The above content may also become available at a later date.
    
 
  PRAGMATA Deluxe Edition  *The licenses for the items in this set can be purchased individually. Please be careful of duplicate purchases.
 
 The Deluxe Edition is a bundle that includes the main game and the Shelter Variety Pack.
 
 Shelter Variety Pack Contents:
 ・Hugh Outfit - Heavy Lifter
 ・Hugh Outfit - Lunar Cat
 ・Diana Outfit - Mecha Builder
 ・Diana Outfit - Fluffy
 ・Weapon Skin - Grip Gun DS
 ・Shelter BGM - Memories Are You (Lo-fi Ver.)
 ・Shelter BGM - Dawn (EDM Ver.)
 ・Shelter BGM - Shelter (Jazz Ver.)
 ・Diana Gesture - Drowsy
 ・Diana Gesture - Pumped Up
 ・Diana Gesture - Stepping
 ・Data Library - Artwork
 
    
 
  About the Game Capcom’s newest IP—PRAGMATA. An all-new Science Fiction action adventure with its own unique hacking twist! 
 It is the near future, and protagonists Hugh and his android companion Diana, must work together as they make their way through the cold lunar research station.

title: Ye Guild Clerk!
description:
Ye Guild Clerk! is a short 2.5D, interactive narrative game, where you play as a newly hired guild clerk in a world full of cute animal adventurers! Perfect for players who love character-driven stories, cute animals, and cozy medieval fantasy worlds.
   
Features     

• Meet a cast of cute animal adventurers, each with their own stories  and quirks!
• Have  5 days to prove you're a good fit for the role! Or suffer the consequences and get fired...
• As a guild clerk, you'll  hand out quests, rewards and equipment! 

But be wary:
• Your choices matter, each action you take shapes the outcomes and stories for each adventurer you run into... for better or for worse!
• Over 40+ individual endings  between all of the adventurers you can meet!
• Decorate your clerk booth with various customizations and decorations! 
• Select from 3 different music tracks to listen to!
    
Controls:
• Point & Click Controls - Drag, Select, & Camera Movement
• WASD/Arrow Keys - Camera Movement
• Click/Space - Continue Dialogue
• ESC - Pause/Settings Menu

Please Note:       
There is no current way to save your progress. It is highly recommended to play in one sitting. The average playthrough can take from 35 - 50 minutes.

title: Purrgatory
description:
Purrgatory is a visual novel about passing time in an afterlife where nothing really matters. Explore a whimsical point-and-click world, get to know its downtrodden inhabitants, and remember — furever's not so bad!
      
  
   About Purrgatory  
    There's a cat in it! 
    Largely LGBTQ+ cast! 
    3-5 hours of cozy escapism! 
    7 charming and realistic characters! 
    80+ hand-drawn locations! 
    Multiple endings! 
    Too many cat puns to count! 
    They put it in a museum!!

localized_description.text:
Purrgatory is a visual novel about passing time in an afterlife where nothing really matters. Explore a whimsical point-and-click world, get to know its downtrodden inhabitants, and remember — furever's not so bad!
      
  
   About Purrgatory  
    There's a cat in it! 
    Largely LGBTQ+ cast! 
    3-5 hours of cozy escapism! 
    7 charming and realistic characters! 
    80+ hand-drawn locations! 
    Multiple endings! 
    Too many cat puns to count! 
    They put it in a museum!!

Purrgatory es una novela visual sobre pasar el rato en el más allá, donde ya todo importa poco. Explora un caprichoso mundo de point-and-click, conoce a sus oprimidos habitantes y recuerda: ¡tienes toda la eternidad para averiguar por qué el gato es dos veces animal!
   
  
      
  
   Sobre Purrgatory 
    ¡Hay un gato!
    ¡Un elenco mayormente LGBTQ+! 
    ¡De 3 a 5 horas de paz y evasión!
    ¡Siete personajes tan encantadores como realistas!
    ¡Más de 80 escenarios dibujados a mano! 
    ¡Varios finales alternativos! 
    ¡Chistes sobre gatos para dar y regalar! 
    ¡¡Lo han puesto en un museo!!

Purrgatory est un visual novel point-and-click sur la vie après la vie, dans un au-delà où rien n'a d'importance. Explorez un monde plein de fantaisie, apprenez à connaître les âmes torturées qui l'habitent, et ne vous inquiétez pas : même dans la mort, on retombe toujours sur ses pattes !
      
  
   À propos de Purrgatory  
    Il y a un petit chat dedans ! 
    Des personnages en majorité LGBTQ+ ! 
    3 à 5 heures de détente dans une atmosphère chaleureuse ! 
    7 personnages charmants et réalistes ! 
    Plus de 80 lieux dessinés à la main ! 
    Plusieurs fins possibles ! 
    Des jeux de mots sur les chats en veux-tu en voilà ! 
    Le jeu a été exposé dans un musée !!

    C'è un gatto! 
    Cast ampiamente LGBTQ+ 
    3-5 ore di escapismo cozy! 
    7 personaggi realistici e affascinanti! 
    80+ scene disegnate a mano! 
    Finali multipli! 
    Battute sui gatti a non finire! 
    L'hanno esposto a un museo!!

title: Cureocity
description:
JOIN US!   Feel free to join our  official Discord to share your ideas with us.
  X: @qiyudixiacheng
 
 
  About the Game  We are "Bread On Board," a collective of independent game developers spread across four countries, united by our passion and meeting during a GameJam. 
  Our game demo was born in the "BOOOM CHALLENGE", a GameJam by GCORES. With only 21 days, we created a game based on a given theme. After the competition, we even won the "Most Popular Game" award at an Online Game Trial Event.
  The full playthrough of our game will take about an hour. We hope to give you a short, but super heartwarming and loving adventure❤️.
  
     A rookie adventurer fresh on the scene and a former mercenary who was transferred into an adventurer due to injury. Two protagonists with contrasting personalities will embark on an adventure of fantasy and healing together. In the mysterious ruins of an underground dungeon that lies in the depth of a jungle, what awaits them will be...
  
        
     According to the tavern's adventurer logs, the team heading into the dungeon features a rookie adventurer and an ex-mercenary who is now working as a healer. The adventurer looks as charming as a doll, and the enthusiasm never disappears; the healer is cool and a bit traditional, acting as a guiding figure for their adventure.
  
        
  What stories have unfolded between these two contrasting characters, and what challenges will they face together in this adventure? The continuation of this adventurous story is yours to discover.
  
     "People think battles need powerful weapons, but strategy at hand is key." 
  
        
  In "Cureocity," the power of your strategy is materialized as the numerical values of your hands in combat. You can swap different weapons or items held in your left and right hands to alter your character's attack and defense stats. You may also change "gestures" to focus attacks or land heavy blows on specific enemies.As you delve deeper into the dungeon, you will take the unique traits of monsters into consideration and discuss strategies with your allies.
  
     In this adventure, you'll discover not only the secrets hidden within the dungeon, but also the truths about the world and the  characters themselves. When faced with contaminated monsters, you can choose to either fight them or attempt to purify them. Of course, you also have the option to let things take their own course.
  
        
  With each decision,the fate of the protagonists may change. The end of this adventure... is yours to decide.
  
  About the Publisher  GCORES PUBLISHING is an independent game publishing venture formed by GCORES, committed to bringing you more outstanding indie games from the BOOOM CHALLENGE.
  Feel free to follow our publisher webpage for future updates.

You can swap different weapons or items held in your left and right hands to alter your character's attack and defense stats. You may also change "gestures" to focus attacks or land heavy blows on specific enemies.As you delve deeper into the dungeon, you will take the unique traits of monsters into consideration and discuss strategies with your allies.
  
     In this adventure, you'll discover not only the secrets hidden within the dungeon, but also the truths about the world and the  characters themselves. When faced with contaminated monsters, you can choose to either fight them or attempt to purify them. Of course, you also have the option to let things take their own course.
  
        
  With each decision,the fate of the protagonists may change. The end of this adventure... is yours to decide.
  
  About the Publisher  GCORES PUBLISHING is an independent game publishing venture formed by GCORES, committed to bringing you more outstanding indie games from the BOOOM CHALLENGE.
  Feel free to follow our publisher webpage for future updates.

brief:
JOIN US!   Feel free to join our  official Discord to share your ideas with us.
  X: @qiyudixiacheng
 
 
  About the Game  We are "Bread On Board," a collective of independent game developers spread across four countries, united by our passion and meeting during a GameJam. 
  Our game demo was born in the "BOOOM CHALLENGE", a GameJam by GCORES. With only 21 days, we created a game based on a given theme. After the competition, we even won the "Most Popular Game" award at an Online Game Trial Event.
  The full playthrough of our game will take about an hour. We hope to give you a short, but super heartwarming and loving adventure❤️.
  
     A rookie adventurer fresh on the scene and a former mercenary who was transferred into an adventurer due to injury. Two protagonists with contrasting personalities will embark on an adventure of fantasy and healing together. In the mysterious ruins of an underground dungeon that lies in the depth of a jungle, what awaits them will be...
  
        
     According to the tavern's adventurer logs, the team heading into the dungeon features a rookie adventurer and an ex-mercenary who is now working as a healer. The adventurer looks as charming as a doll, and the enthusiasm never disappears; the healer is cool and a bit traditional, acting as a guiding figure for their adventure.
  
        
  What stories have unfolded between these two contrasting characters, and what challenges will they face together in this adventure? The continuation of this adventurous story is yours to discover.
  
     "People think battles need powerful weapons, but strategy at hand is key." 
  
        
  In "Cureocity," the power of your strategy is materialized as the numerical values of your hands in combat. You can swap different weapons or items held in your left and right hands to alter your character's attack and defense stats.
